title: VillagerXP
description: Villagers can level up by picking up experience orbs and bottles.
body:
# **VillagerXP**
Level up your villagers without spamming trades and cluttering your inventory with unnecessary items.

Villagers now attract nearby experience orbs and can consume experience bottles.

Server and Client side

![Mod Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/jrEBxP1.gif)


![Mod Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/ZSXsZwz.gif)

Adjust to your preference
![Mod Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/hYXgeaP.gif)
